overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Night City from Cyberpunk 2077). The player crosses wide intersections lined with palm trees and glass skyscrapers, walks under elevated monorail tracks, and approaches the Kiroshi building with its distinctive neon signage. Bright midday sun illuminates the vivid neon advertisements and reflective building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban intersection with distinctive blue painted crosswalk

events.description: black sedan passes from left to right in front of the camera
camera turns left to navigate around the intersection corner

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide blue-painted crosswalk through the futuristic city intersection

notable_agents.action: orange van parked on the left side of the street at the start of the clip
black sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

elevated monorail track structure running above the street
tall futuristic glass and steel buildings lining the street
distinctive bright blue painted pedestrian crossing
palm trees lining the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a view of a futuristic orange van parked on the left, then moves forward across a wide intersection with a distinctive blue crosswalk. Tall glass skyscrapers rise in the distance under an elevated monorail track. A black sedan passes by as the camera turns left to navigate the corner of the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with vertical view of towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tall buildings
camera tilts back down to street level

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the towering skyscrapers, then continuing forward

entered.detail: very tall pinkish glass skyscraper with reflective windows dominating the skyline

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to admire the towering pink glass skyscraper and surrounding high-rises, then tilts back down to street level. The blue crosswalk and orange van are now behind as the view opens up to the buildings ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under elevated monorail overpass with security fencing

events.description: moving from open intersection to sidewalk under the monorail overpass
passing by pedestrians walking in the same direction along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the shadow of the monorail track, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction
pedestrians walking in the opposite direction passing by

entered.detail: tall black metal security fence with pointed tops running along the right side
building with large blue awning and circular advertisement displays
large rectangular concrete planters containing palm trees

segments.scene_description: Moving under the elevated monorail track, the scene becomes semi-covered with mixed lighting. A tall black metal fence runs along the right side while concrete planters with palm trees line the left. The camera passes pedestrians walking in both directions along the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to Kiroshi building entrance with prominent neon signage

events.description: turning toward the Kiroshi building entrance with the large neon sign
moving into deeper shadow as approaching the building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the Kiroshi building entrance, observing the neon signage and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving toward the camera near the Kiroshi entrance

entered.detail: large dark building with 'KIROSHI OPTICALS' signage and distinctive circular neon target sign
large vertical neon sign reading 'EL GUAPO' on the building facade
large glowing circular target-like neon sign on the Kiroshi building

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the Kiroshi building, marked by a large glowing circular neon sign and 'EL GUAPO' signage on the left. Moving from under the overpass into the open, the street continues past the building entrance with vehicles driving by. The monorail track recedes into the distance on the left as the camera moves forward along the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sunlit cyberpunk intersection that transitions from an open street into a sheltered urban corridor before emerging before a neon-lit corporate landmark. It begins by moving past a parked orange van and across a wide blue crosswalk, navigating a corner as a black sedan passes beneath towering glass skyscrapers and an elevated monorail track. As the camera tilts upward to take in the scale of a pink glass high-rise, the view shifts back down to street level and glides under the monorail overpass. The environment then becomes semi-covered, passing a black metal fence and palm trees in concrete planters while weaving through pedestrians on the sidewalk. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows of the overpass into the open light, approaching the Kiroshi building and its glowing circular neon signage as the monorail track recedes into the distance.
